title: alyssum oschtenicum
intro: Alyssum oschtenicum, also known as Russian alyssum, is a flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, characterized by its small white blooms and delicate foliage. Traditionally, Alyssum oschtenicum has been used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Alyssum oschtenicum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its potential medicinal and health benefits.
